_doc: Each arm = one kit, loaded the way a user actually has it. Skill-based kits (kittens-crew, ponytail, caveman) load the FULL plugin via --plugin-dir, so their commands + skills + SessionStart hook/persona are all real — not just a persona snippet. yagni/yagni-oneliner are pure prompt strings (--append-system-prompt). baseline gets nothing. Isolation: --setting-sources project,local --strict-mcp-config excludes the user's global config; --plugin-dir loads only the arm's plugin.

arms.name: yagni-oneliner
arms.appendText: Follow YAGNI principles, and prefer one-liner solutions.
